verifier.method: pnpm verify:quick + pnpm test (14/14) + pnpm test:db (7/7)

static_proof.description: Null stake_units guard inserted in candidate-pick-scanner.ts between processSubmission return and governance brake. Guard links pick_id to stop retries, skips brake transition to avoid constraint violation, logs warning for ops visibility.
static_proof.test_added: candidate-pick-scanner: null stake_units on idempotency collision — skipped and pick_id linked to stop retry loop (UTV2-1367)

root_cause_verified.trigger: UPDATE picks SET status = ... during transitionPickLifecycleAtomic
root_cause_verified.source: 2902 legacy picks with stake_units IS NULL from April-May 2026
root_cause_verified.loop: pick_id never linked → candidate.pick_id = null → re-scanned every 60s → same idempotency collision → same constraint violation

runtime_proof.description: pnpm test:db run against live Supabase post-fix (7/7 pass). First run flaked on UTV2-996 settlement timeout (Supabase transient degradation); re-run confirmed 7/7 pass.
runtime_proof.flake_note: First test:db run failed 4/7 on UTV2-996 correction chain with statement timeout (Supabase transient degradation, unrelated to this fix). Re-run: 7/7 pass.
